ValidationRule.description: Account Name length has to be < 32 for NATT Accounts
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Len(Name)>32, OR( $RecordType.Name="Dealer", $RecordType.Name="Customer", $RecordType.Name="NATT Group Ownership", $RecordType.Name="NATT OEM" ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Account Name field length cannot exceed 32 characters
